docket_entries.description: DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF MOTION (4 DECLARATIONS) FILED BY DEFENDANT SONORA SPRINGS INVESTORS, LLC DBA "MOUNTAIN SPRINGS GOLF CLUB" MOUNTAIN SPRINGS DEVELOPMENT LLC
REPLY MEMO INSUPPORT OF MOTION FOR CHANGE OF VENUE FILED BY DEFENDANT SONORA SPRINGS INVESTORS, LLC DBA "MOUNTAIN SPRINGS GOLF CLUB" MOUNTAIN SPRINGS DEVELOPMENT LLC

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS SONORA SPRINGS INVESTORS, LLC AND MOUNTAIN SPRINGS DEVELOPMENT LLC'S (AMENDED) MOTION TO TRANSFER VENUE TO TUOLUMNE COUNTY IS GRANTED. DEFENDANTS' MOTION IS TIMELY AS IT WAS FILED WITHIN A REASONABLE TIME AFTER THE ANSWER WAS FILED. DEFENDANTS HAVE MET THEIR BURDEN OF SHOWING THAT THE CONVENIENCE OF WITNESSES AND THE ENDS OF JUSTICE WOULD BE PROMOTED BY THE TRANSFER OF VENUE. (CCP 397(C).) IF THEY HAVE NOT DONE SO ALREADY, DEFENDANTS ARE ORDERED TO POST THE CLERK'S COSTS AND FEES FOR TRANSFERRING THE ACTION TO TUOLUMNE COUNTY PURSUANT TO CCP 399(A). ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY VAUGHN, CSR #6185 (302)

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Mar-14-2014 Vacated

(Amended) Notice Of Motion For Change Of Venue
Off Calendar Oct-16-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: ANDREW MCDEVITT, ESQ., 415.981.7210, FOR PLAINTIFF SHIRLEY CAMPBELL.
LISA PAN, ESQ., 650.689.5160, FOR DEFENDANT SONORA SPRINGS INVESTORS, LLC AND MOUNTAIN SPRINGS DEVELOPMENT, LLC.

RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling: DEFENDANTs SONORA SPRINGS INVESTORS, LLC and MOUNTAIN SPRINGS DEVELOPMENT LLC's (Amended) Motion to transfer venue to Tuolumne County is granted. Defendants' motion is timely as it was filed within a reasonable time after the answer was filed. Defendants have met their burden of showing that the convenience of witnesses and the ends of justice would be promoted by the transfer of venue. (CCP 397(c).) If they have not done so already, Defendants are ordered to post the clerk's costs and fees for transferring the action to Tuolumne County pursuant to CCP 399(a). Order signed in open court. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR #6185

Ntc On Mtn For Change Of Venue (Cal Civ Proc. 397(C)
